name: CTA Collage Duo
description: A dynamic two-panel call-to-action layout that combines bold typography with editorial-style imagery, perfect for creative agencies and lifestyle brands looking to make an energetic brand statement while capturing leads.

descriptions.descriptive: A dynamic two-panel layout featuring bold typography and editorial-style imagery with modern geometric elements. The design balances high-contrast visuals with clean whitespace, creating an energetic yet trustworthy feel through friendly color palettes and confident messaging hierarchy.
descriptions.usage: Perfect for capturing leads while reinforcing brand identity on landing pages or homepage sections. Use when you need to present dual value propositions or split-test different calls-to-action, combining brand storytelling with conversion-focused elements.
descriptions.audienceFit: Ideal for creative agencies, lifestyle brands, or forward-thinking B2B companies targeting millennials and Gen Z. Appeals to businesses that balance professionalism with personality, particularly those in design, wellness, or innovative service sectors.
